title: cosmo_fate: A preregistered fragility audit of DESI-era cosmic-fate claims
description: v1.2.1 reproducibility hotfix for the v1.2 scientific-correction archive of "Is cosmic fate an inference or an assumption?" Scientific results and the PDF are unchanged. The hotfix rounds generated fragility and early-dark-energy audit floats to a declared portable precision so regenerated JSON is bit-for-bit stable across BLAS/NumPy runner backends. The archive retains the A-004--A-006 corrections, original-weight nested samples, independent-seed evidence checks, frozen preregistration, fitted-truth LCDM null mocks, and compressed-CMB and finite-mock evidence boundaries.
